violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): Inadequate sanitizing with quaternary ammonia was noted in the three compartment sink. Staff replaced the sanitizer jug and refilled sink

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap dispenser was noted not working at the hand washing sink in the kitchen Repaired by staff. | HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Paper towels noted not provided at the hand washing sink in the kitchen. Replaced by staff
